Product

One platform. Every workflow.

Sorro brings your dashboard, projects, people, storage, Studio Review, CRM, reports, invoices and AI into one clean workspace.

Your business at a glance.

Start with what needs attention: overdue tasks, reviews, client updates, storage, reports and team activity.

Projects

Move work from idea to delivery.

Tasks, chats, files, whiteboards, approvals and activity timelines stay attached to the project instead of scattered across apps.

To doIn reviewDone
Client report draft
Studio review approved

Studio Review

Review clips, images and versions.

Upload work, add timestamped comments, request changes, approve versions and keep feedback connected to the workspace storage.

Storage

Workspace-owned file system.

Files belong to the workspace, then link into projects, clients and reviews. No duplicate uploads. One source of truth.

Brand KitProjectsClientsReportsInvoicesArchive

Reports & invoices

Turn activity into business admin.

Create client updates, project summaries, reports and invoice-ready records from the work already happening inside CSorro.

Completed tasks: 42
Approved files: 18
Invoice draft: £1,250

AI Assistant

Ask your operating system.

The AI Assistant uses workspace context to find blockers, summarise chats, create tasks, review storage, generate reports and guide the next action.

Ask the AI Assistant…

“What needs attention today?”

3 approvals • 2 overdue tasks • 1 invoice draft
